narrative:
Weathersfield Twp C (precinct in Trumbull County) has 377 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 11.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 30.5%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 18.6 percentage points.
